title: Everyone talks about AI. But in practice?
description: You've tried. The results are inconsistent. You don't have time to dig deeper. AI remains a gimmick instead of saving you time.

cards.title: You've tried, without a method
cards.description: ChatGPT is a tool. Without a method tailored to your context, the results remain generic and unusable.

cards.title: No IT department
cards.description: You're a small business. You don't have a CTO or a developer. But you want to benefit from digital tools.
features: No one to set up your tools

cards.title: No one shows you how
cards.description: Everyone says AI will change everything. But no one shows you how to apply it to YOUR context.
features: A gap between promise and reality
Someone needs to bridge the gap
